AI Automation Ecosystem
  • Deep Content Analyzer API
  • View page source

Deep Content Analyzer API

AI-powered code comprehension

Key Features

  • Actually reads and understands code

  • Website discovery

  • Music collection analysis

  • External volume scanning

Module Reference

🧠 DEEP CONTENT ANALYZER ULTIMATE

Advanced content-aware analysis that ACTUALLY READS AND UNDERSTANDS: - Python scripts (AST parsing + AI comprehension) - Websites and HTML projects - Music collections and metadata - External volumes (/Volumes) - All file types with intelligent categorization

Features: 🔍 Deep code comprehension (not just pattern matching) 🎨 Website/project discovery and analysis 🎵 Music collection analysis (ID3, metadata, organization) 💾 External volume scanning (/Volumes) 🧠 AI-powered semantic understanding 📊 Comprehensive relationship mapping 🎯 Advanced use case identification

class DEEP_CONTENT_ANALYZER_ULTIMATE.PythonScript(filepath: str, filename: str, purpose: str, actual_functionality: str, imports: ~typing.List[str], classes: ~typing.List[~typing.Dict[str, ~typing.Any]], functions: ~typing.List[~typing.Dict[str, ~typing.Any]], main_logic: str, api_integrations: ~typing.List[str], workflows: ~typing.List[str], complexity_score: int, lines: int, documentation_quality: str, use_cases: ~typing.List[str], related_scripts: ~typing.List[str] = <factory>)[source]

Bases: object

Deep analysis of a Python script

filepath: str
filename: str
purpose: str
actual_functionality: str
imports: List[str]
classes: List[Dict[str, Any]]
functions: List[Dict[str, Any]]

complexity_score: int

documentation_quality: str

class DEEP_CONTENT_ANALYZER_ULTIMATE.Website(path: str, name: str, type: str, technologies: List[str], pages: List[str], assets: Dict[str, int], configuration: Dict[str, Any], purpose: str, deployment_status: str)[source]

class DEEP_CONTENT_ANALYZER_ULTIMATE.DeepContentAnalyzerUltimate[source]

Bases: object

Ultimate content analyzer that ACTUALLY UNDERSTANDS what code does

__init__()[source]
deep_analyze_python_script(filepath: str) → PythonScript[source]

ACTUALLY READ AND UNDERSTAND what a Python script does

Uses AST parsing + AI comprehension

discover_websites(search_paths: List[str]) → List[Website][source]

Discover and analyze websites and web projects

analyze_music_collection(music_path: str = '/Users/steven/Music') → MusicCollection[source]

Deep analysis of music collection

scan_external_volumes() → List[ExternalVolume][source]

Scan /Volumes for external drives and analyze content

generate_comprehensive_report(output_file: str = 'DEEP_CONTENT_ANALYSIS_ULTIMATE.json')[source]

Generate comprehensive analysis report

async DEEP_CONTENT_ANALYZER_ULTIMATE.main()[source]

Run comprehensive deep analysis
